creator: mb@imp.ch
text:
Hi,

I think I've found the problem. Can anybody else confirm it ?

The 'Internal Compiler error' only happens if the compilerflags
contain -ggdb. So does anybody how to fix c++ ?

Martin

Martin Blapp, mb@imp.ch
